definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He bought the book and the pen as well.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He bought the book and the pen as well.
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Since you are here, you can help.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Since you are here, you can help.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a reason (similar to 'because').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a reason (similar to 'because').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have been here since 9 AM.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I have been here since 9 AM.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate a starting point in time.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate a starting point in time.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As I was tired, I went to bed.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: As I was tired, I went to bed.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to state a reason (similar to 'because').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to state a reason (similar to 'because').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He sang as he walked.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate that two actions are happening at the same time.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate that two actions are happening at the same time.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is as tall as me.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She is as tall as me.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to make a comparison of equality.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to make a comparison of equality.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.
definitions.usage_context_en: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.
definitions.usage_context_en: In the intervening period of time.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In the intervening period of time.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I don't know what to do.

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.]
